data.title: SC4 gap: sprint Phase 7 implementation_gap routing does not invoke implementation-plan in epic-direct mode
data.description:
## Problem
Epic SC4 and story 1826-b0ee DD2 require that implementation_gap failures at epic validation route to '/dso:implementation-plan in epic-direct mode to create new tasks.' Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 sets ROUTING: implementation-plan in the gap-classification signal but then falls through to 'existing Phase 7 remediation flow (Step 1)' which creates bug tasks directly via '.claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug' — not by invoking /dso:implementation-plan.

The routing label and the actual orchestrator action are inconsistent.

## Fix Options
Either:
(a) Update Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 to explicitly invoke /dso:implementation-plan in epic-direct mode when ROUTING: implementation-plan is received for implementation_gap SCs, OR
(b) Revise the SC4/DD language to clarify that 'ROUTING: implementation-plan' means bug-task creation (matching the current actual behavior)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 implementation_gap path is consistent with SC4 (either invoke /dso:implementation-plan in epic-direct mode OR revise SC4 to match actual behavior)
- [ ] Completion-verifier passes for epic f997-ed78 with PASS on SC4
- [ ] tests/skills/test_sprint_gap_classification.py covers the corrected routing path
